{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Battle of Enosh
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A battle occurred at [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
